# Base Project LLM Guide

This repository is a reusable Angular + Spring Boot starter optimized for coding agents.

## Canonical Instructions

1. Root guidance: `AGENTS.md`
2. Frontend scope guidance: `client/AGENTS.md`
3. Backend scope guidance: `server/AGENTS.md`

Nearest-scope instructions win over broader instructions.

## Stack Baseline

- Angular `21.2.x` + Nx `22.x` (`client`, `client-e2e`)
- Node.js `22.15.x` for frontend tooling and builds
- Spring Boot `4.0.4` + Gradle + Java toolchain `21` (`server`)
- Spock/Groovy test structure in `server/src/test/groovy`
- PostgreSQL local runtime via `docker/compose.yaml`

## Architecture Constraints

- Backend uses clean architecture by feature.
- Infrastructure communication must go through Ports/Adapters.
- Avoid generic multi-purpose `*Service` classes.
- Keep use cases single-purpose.
- Create/update ADRs for architecture-impacting decisions.

## Skill System

- Skills live in `.agents/skills`.
- Validate skills with `pnpm run skills:verify`.
- Refresh external skills with `pnpm run skills:update`.
- Skill structure reference: `docs/ai/skills-structure.md`.

## Validation Commands

- Frontend: `pnpm nx build client`, `pnpm nx test client`, `pnpm nx e2e client-e2e`
- Backend: `./gradlew :server:test`, `./gradlew :server:build`
- Architecture: `pnpm run test:server:architecture`
- Full: `pnpm run verify` or `pnpm run verify:e2e`
